description: Fresh-signal corpus-walk find. BT4-077 'Indomitable Dynasty SS Son Goku' is canonically Son Goku Super Saiyan form (vision-passed, trivia-passed, ip_verified). The son-goku character node already anchors BT4-005, BT4-026, BT4-079, BT4-080 from the same Colossal Warfare set, AND BT4-077's own Trivia ('Design — The Indomitable Dynasty title framing is consistent with BT4's Goku cluster, which includes Unbroken Dynasty Son Goku (BT4-079) and Deadly Golden Great Ape Son Goku (BT4-080) — a three-card mini-cycle') explicitly names BT4-077 as part of the Goku-cluster mini-cycle. Yet BT4-077 was orphan from son-goku's appears_on. Standard orphan-wire move. Mirror: add characters: [son-goku] to BT4-077 frontmatter + extend son-goku appears_on to include bt4-077. Pushes son-goku 11 -> 12 anchors.
other_candidates_considered: Pan solo node (4 corpus anchors: BT3-009, BT4-009, SD2-04, TB2-024) — passes 3-anchor threshold, but Mr. Nodeley node-budget already spent at E2 on destroyer-god-attendant-dyad; surfaced to janitor_triage as future commission candidate
BT4-018 Baby Vengeance Unleashed Vegeta — already wired wave 66
BT4-030 At All Costs Vegeta — already wired wave 66

Pan -> baby-dbgt edge — REFUSED, Pan is the GT-protagonist who EVADES Baby's possession; baby-dbgt anchors Baby and his apparatus, not GT protagonists generally; the canonical relation is too thin for a character-pointer; correct destination is a future GT-protagonist-trio or Pan-solo node
